title: Evelin Talts

infobox.key: [Authority control databases](/wiki/Help:Authority_control "Help:Authority control"): People [Edit this at Wikidata](https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q5416240#identifiers "Edit this at Wikidata")

infobox.value: This biographical article relating to Estonian athletics is a [stub](/wiki/Wikipedia:Stub "Wikipedia:Stub"). You can help Wikipedia by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Evelin_Talts&action=edit).

([née](/wiki/Birth_name#Maiden_and_married_names "Birth name") Evelin Kärner; born 18 May 1977) is an [Estonian](/wiki/Estonia "Estonia") [long-distance runner](/wiki/Long-distance_runner "Long-distance runner").[[2]](#cite_note-2) Talts was born in [Tallinn](/wiki/Tallinn "Tallinn"). She competed in the [marathon](/wiki/Athletics_at_the_2012_Summer_Olympics_%E2%80%93_Women%27s_marathon "Athletics at the 2012 Summer Olympics – Women's marathon") at the [2012 Summer Olympics](/wiki/2012_Summer_Olympics "2012 Summer Olympics"), placing 103rd with a time of 2:54:15.[[3]](#cite_note-3) In 2012 and 2014 she won the [Tallinn Marathon](/wiki/Tallinn_Marathon "Tallinn Marathon").

["Women's Marathon: Results"](http://www.london2012.com/athletics/event/women-marathon/index.html?v=20120806-055117400). London 2012. Retrieved 2012-08-09.`{{cite web}}`: CS1 maint: deprecated archival service ([link](/wiki/Category:CS1_maint:_deprecated_archival_service "Category:CS1 maint: deprecated archival service"))

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Estonian long-distance runner

Evelin Talts

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Evelin Talts (left) with [Ni Lar San](/wiki/Ni_Lar_San "Ni Lar San") at the [Women's marathon](/wiki/Athletics_at_the_2012_Summer_Olympics_%E2%80%93_Women%27s_marathon "Athletics at the 2012 Summer Olympics – Women's marathon") in London 2012. | |
| Personal information | |
| Born | (1977-05-18) 18 May 1977 (age 48)[[1]](#cite_note-ESBL-1) |
| Height | 1.58 m (5 ft 2 in) |
| Weight | 54 kg (119 lb) |
| Sport | |
| Country | [Estonia](/wiki/Estonia "Estonia") |
| Sport | Athletics |
| Event | [Marathon](/wiki/Marathon "Marathon") |

**Evelin Talts** ([née](/wiki/Birth_name#Maiden_and_married_names "Birth name") Evelin Kärner; born 18 May 1977) is an [Estonian](/wiki/Estonia "Estonia") [long-distance runner](/wiki/Long-distance_runner "Long-distance runner").[[2]](#cite_note-2) Talts was born in [Tallinn](/wiki/Tallinn "Tallinn"). She competed in the [marathon](/wiki/Athletics_at_the_2012_Summer_Olympics_%E2%80%93_Women%27s_marathon "Athletics at the 2012 Summer Olympics – Women's marathon") at the [2012 Summer Olympics](/wiki/2012_Summer_Olympics "2012 Summer Olympics"), placing 103rd with a time of 2:54:15.[[3]](#cite_note-3) In 2012 and 2014 she won the [Tallinn Marathon](/wiki/Tallinn_Marathon "Tallinn Marathon").
